executives.name: Ann Fudge
executives.background: Former Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Young & Rubicam Brands.

executives.name: Diane Jurgens
executives.background: Diane Jurgens is an independent non-executive director. She was formerly the CTO of BHP and has held senior leadership roles at The Walt Disney Company and General Motors.

executives.name: Vishal Sikka
executives.background: Founder and CEO of Vianai Systems, Inc. and former CEO of Infosys Limited.
